# world-viz golden fixtures

`surface.seed1337.json` is the **engine-authored** golden fixture: it is written by
the Unity EditMode test `Assets/Tests/EditMode/TerrainFixtureExportTests.cs`, which
captures `SandboxTerrainGenerator` output (surface heights + sampled chunks) for the
default settings.

It is intentionally **not** generated by the Node tool — that would be circular.
`tools/world-viz/test/parity.test.js` asserts the JS port reproduces this fixture
exactly, so the file must come from the engine to be meaningful.

## Regenerate

```bash
# from the repo root, with Unity 6.0.5.1f1 in PATH
Unity -batchmode -quit -projectPath . -runTests -testPlatform EditMode \
  -testResults TestResults/editmode.xml -logFile Logs/unity-editmode-tests.log
```

Running the EditMode tests (re)writes this fixture. Until it exists, the Node parity
test is skipped with an explanatory message instead of failing.
